/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libgalay-kernel.a "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/async/AioFile.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/async/AsyncFile.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/async/FileWatcher.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/async/TcpSocket.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/async/UdpSocket.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/common/Buffer.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/common/Bytes.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/common/Error.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/common/HandleOption.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/Awaitable.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/ComputeScheduler.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/Coroutine.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/EpollScheduler.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/IOUringScheduler.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/KqueueScheduler.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/Runtime.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/TimerScheduler.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-kernel.dir/kernel/Waker.cc.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libgalay-kernel.a
